title: T. rex Storm — Through the Rain
alt: Scientifically accurate paleoart of a Tyrannosaurus rex emerging through heavy rain and lightning, dramatic ground-level angle capturing the full scale of the apex predator.
description: A Tyrannosaurus rex pushes through a torrential Late Cretaceous downpour, lightning splitting the sky behind it as the rain swallows the horizon. The angle sits low, at ground level, so you feel the full scale of the animal coming toward you. Detailed, realistic paleoart with accurate proportions, printed sharp enough to hang up close.
caption: A Tyrannosaurus rex pushes through a heavy Late Cretaceous downpour, seen low and head-on as lightning breaks behind it.
